articles.title: Coinbase rolls out Polygon support for transfers of ETH, USDC
articles.description: Coinbase debuts support for crypto transfers on both Polygon and Solana as part of the company’s multi-chain expansion.

articles.title: Do Kwon Has ‘Great Confidence’ In Restoring Terra Ecosystem To Its Former Glory
articles.description: In the interview with the Wall Street Journal, Kwon asserted he has “great confidence in our ability to build back even stronger than we once were.”

articles.title: Kucoin banned in Ontario, Canada after ghosting securities commission
articles.description: The Ontario Securities Commission announced that it’s banning crypto exchange Kucoin from operating in Ontario and handing Bybit a $2.5 million fine.

articles.title: Ripple Opens Its First Office in Canada
articles.description: On Wednesday (June 22), FinTech firm Ripple announced the opening of its first office in Canada, which will “serve as a key engineering hub.” This office, which is located in Toronto, Ontario, will at first have 50 engineers, but the aim is to “expand to hundreds of blockchain software engineers including applied machine learning scientists, […]

articles.title: MATIC pumps 23% on launch of Polygon ID solution

articles.title: Dogecoin Increasingly Tied To Terrorism And Child Sex Abuse Material, Research Shows
articles.description: Dogecoin, Elon Musk’s favorite cryptocurrency, is now being utilized in a greater number of illegal acts, according to a new analysis. The token’s value and popularity have risen dramatically in recent months. The research’s author, Blockchain analytics firm Elliptic, claimed to have discovered proof that the famous meme coin was being utilized by criminals as […]
